description:
Features:

  • - Features solar-powered LED light beads on the ribs
  • - Double canopy design creates plenty of shade
  • - 12 ribs for extra support between steel frame and canopy
  • - Crank handle opens and closes canopy easily
  • - Large canopy for lots of protection, top vents to prevent wind build-up
  • - Suitable for gardens, patios, and other outdoor spaces
  • - Assembly required

Specification:

  • - Color: Wine Red
  • - Material: Steel, Polyester
  • - Overall Dimension: 14.4' L x 8.4' W x 7.9' H
  • - Height from Canopy to Floor: 6.6'
  • - Pole Dimension: 1.89" Dia. x 0.03"T
  • - Base Dimension: 28.3" L x 28.3" W x 5.9" H
  • - Solar Panel Dimension: 4.7" L x 4.7" W x 1.2" T
  • - Solar Panel Power: 1.2W
  • - Solar Panel Voltage: 1.2V
  • - Battery Pack: 1600mAh / 1.2V
  • - Note 1: Do not use umbrella during extreme weather (strong wind, heavy rain, snow).

Package Includes:

  • - 1 x Double-Sided Parasol
  • - 1 x Manual
